title: AURORA, 33569, Palm Pals Airy Avocado 5In, Soft Toy, Green and Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Airy Avocado cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: This cute Airy Avocado fits into the palm of your hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and cuddly. His body is a soft green and beige plush material. This is a super cute playful Avocado soft toy. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Avocado fruit. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
